help: Commands: hsave [q], hrun [os/project], teach [q]=[a], hcam, hlist, hedit [name], ghost
ping youtube: run::echo -e "${C}[HAXX]${RES} Testing latency to YouTube Uplink..." && ping -c 4 youtube.com
myip: run::echo -e "${C}[HAXX]${RES} Scanning Network Identity...\n" && echo -e "${G}Local IP:${RES}" && ifconfig | grep "inet " | grep -v 127.0.0.1 | awk '{print $2}' && echo -e "\n${M}Public IP:${RES}" && curl -s ifconfig.me
stop: run::echo -e "${R}[!] TERMINATING BACKGROUND PROTOCOLS...${RES}" && killall python3 php ssh && echo -e "${G}[+] SYSTEM PORTS CLEARED.${RES}"
get os: run::bash -c 'read -p "Enter OS Name: " osname && proot-distro install $osname'
